auth.headline: Verify customers in seconds. Trust built in.
auth.subheadline: One platform connecting banks and fintechs to national identity systems — secure, fast, and audit-ready from day one.
auth.feature1: Verify customers in seconds, not days
auth.useCredentials: Welcome back. Sign in to access your dashboard.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Live view of your verification middleware platform.

tenants.title: Tenants
tenants.subtitle: Service providers (banks) onboarded to the platform.
tenants.newTenantDescription: A tenant represents a bank or service provider integrating with the platform.

empty.title: No tenants yet
empty.description: Onboard your first bank to start issuing API credentials and routing verification calls.

credential.title: Issue API credential
credential.description: Generate a client_id / client_secret pair for the bank to call /api/v1/verify/* with.
credential.issuedDescription: The secret is shown only once. Copy it now — you cannot retrieve it later.
credential.label: Label (optional)
credential.warn: ⚠ The secret is shown only once. Store it securely now.

detail.noSubscriptions: No subscriptions yet — create one from the Subscriptions page.

plans.title: Plans
plans.subtitle: Subscription tiers — each plan controls operation access, pricing, quotas, and which response fields are visible.

empty.title: No plans yet
empty.description: Create a plan to define which operations a tenant can call and which response fields they receive.

detail.fieldEntitlementsSubtitle: Response fields visible under this plan
detail.noFields: No fields registered for this operation.

subscriptions.title: Subscriptions
subscriptions.subtitle: Bind tenants to plans. The active subscription drives entitlement resolution at request time.

catalog.title: Service Catalog
catalog.subtitle: Backend providers and operations registered with the platform. Add new ones via Flyway migrations + a connector implementation.

transactions.title: Transactions
transactions.subtitle: Every verification call routed through the platform. Failures, timeouts, and entitlement rejections are also recorded here.

empty.title: No transactions
empty.description: Make a verification call as a bank tenant to see transactions appear here.

reports.title: Reports
reports.subtitle: Daily and monthly transaction reports with success rate, revenue, and CSV export.
reports.adjustFilters: Try widening the date range or selecting a different tenant.

billing.title: Billing
billing.subtitle: Per-tenant billing aggregation. Each successful billable transaction creates one billing event.
billing.showingFor: Showing billing data for tenant {{code}} in period {{period}}.

empty.title: No billing events
empty.description: Successful billable transactions will appear here as soon as they're recorded.

billing.noPeriodEvents: No billing events in this period.
